name: Fit Beat Combat : Boxing Fitness Workout

reviews.review_description:
I've played VR Fit Beat Combat almost every day for the last 5 months and have lost about 50 pounds. The 20-minute Combat workout is my favorite and has been a huge part of my weight-loss journey.
My only complaint is that around the 7:30 mark, the sound cuts out for about a minute, and the workout runs about a minute longer than the 20-minute timer. I love the game, but I'd really like to see these issues fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hello mrskaos,

The issue you reported has now been successfully fixed!

Thank you so much for playing the latest version and updating your review to a 5-star rating. Our entire team is incredibly grateful for your support.

Thank you once again for providing us with such valuable feedback to help improve the app. We will continue to do our very best in development to ensure a wonderful experience for you!

reviews.review_description: this game is amazing and i love it wish it was free to play more games and more levels and more things i think people would be a lot fitter if things were a lot freer and not always expensive and have to pay for it anyways thank you i appreciate it

developer_response.body:
Hello Dadbrown,

Thank you so much for your amazing review and for loving the game! We really appreciate your kind words and enthusiasm.

Regarding your thoughts on making the game and more content free, please rest assured that your valuable feedback has been shared with the team.

Thank you again for your support. We will keep doing our best to develop the app so you can continue to enjoy your fitness journey!

reviews.review_description: Games great but the song ignition is glitched where it never finishes and there are no original classic songs probably due to copy right issues so they all sound made by AI. If your a teenager and you play this you will sweat like crazy and get acne everywhere on your nose and sides of your nose lol

developer_response.body:
Hi,yessir12249

The issue with “Ignition” not finishing has been fixed in v0.5.9!
Thanks for reporting it. I’m glad you’re enjoying the game.
For the music, we use original tracks because of copyright, but I hear you on the song selection and overall feel. I’ll share your feedback with the team and keep working to make the music and gameplay feel better.
Thanks again for playing — we’ll keep improving Fit Beat Combat and making it more fun!

reviews.review_description: Absolutely love this-  I can really feel the burn the next day ! Only down side is the terrible music on some of the workouts 😆 and it doesn't break down the calories burnt day by day its per workout or a total for all the days you've worked out or have I missed something?

developer_response.body:
Hello Tommyd.49,

Thank you so much for your review. We are delighted to hear that you are really feeling the impact of the workouts the next day!

Regarding your feedback on the music and calorie tracking, I apologize for the inconvenience this may cause. I will be sure to share your valuable feedback with our development team for future improvements.

We appreciate your feedback and are committed to improving our app. We hope you continue to enjoy your workouts with us!

reviews.review_description: THIS GAME IS REALLY PISSING ME OFF. HAD REG SUBSCRIPTION THE 9.99 every three momths…IT WAS OK BUT IT IS THE MUSIC IN THE WORKOUTS THAT U DON’T KNOW WHAT U R GONNA GET. EVEN IN THE WORKOUT U CAN START OFF OK BUT THEN U WILL GET SOME OBNOXIOUS ELECTROBEAT SONG THAT IS UNBECOMING FOR A 60 year old gmom!!!  SO I GO TO UPGRADE TO THE 8.99 per month cuz it says full access to all music…..i paid, had to wait three months, upgraded, uninstalled/reinstalled and even under my user name it says premium but the version is exactly the same😡 …..same everything. same old boring songs that i have to play over and over….If you want people to like your game when they are willing to pay 8.99 per month then get all the music in a list and let people choose fromm the list they are paying for.   LET US KNOW ALL THE MUSIC EVEN IN THE WORKOUT BEFORE WE START….I would START A WORKOUT AMD BE OK BUT THEN HAVE TO QUIT IN THE MIDDLE BECAUSE OF THE MUSIC being so overbearing.  THEN AFTER WAITING THREE MONTS FOR THE OLD SUBSCRIPTION TO BE OVER TO UPGRADE (THERE WAS NO OTHER WAY TO DO IT) I WAS EXCITED TO TRY THE UPGRADE OF ALL AVAILABLE MUSIC…..WHAT A DISAPPOINTMENT…I CAN NOT EVEN SEE THE DIFFERENCE.  IT IS THE SAME EXACT THING FOR MORE MONEY.  I HAD IT WITH THIS GAME.  PLEASE REFUND MY 8.99 I PAID AT THE END OF APRIL/MAY FOR THE NEW STUFF THAT ISN’T NEW.

developer_response.body:
Hi Crazie12gram,
The 3-month plan ($9.99) and the 1-month plan ($8.99) are the exact same Premium subscription. Both include full access to all music and content — the only difference is the billing cycle. There is no separate higher tier with additional songs, so the experience is the same because the plan itself is the same one you already had. We're sorry for the confusion around the plans.
That said, your suggestion is a strong one — showing the full song list before each workout and letting players pick the tracks. We'll bring this to our development team. Feedback like this is genuinely valuable.
For the refund, subscription payments are processed through the Meta Store, so refund requests need to go directly through Meta Support.
We hope this helps clear things up.
— Fit Beat Combat Team

reviews.review_description: the entire game is really good plus it really gets good in exercise and you don't really need subscription for it so i love it very much

Hello Tiberiusjester275,

Thank you so much for the fantastic review! We are absolutely thrilled to hear that you are loving the entire game and finding it to be a great workout.

We will continue to work hard on development to ensure everyone can keep enjoying their fitness journey. Thank you so much for your support!

It is actually giving me an absolute workout that I need because I am trying to lose weight plus lose some belly fat that I have overall I recommend this game so much it is so much fun. Even though it requires a subscription, you don’t have to do the subscription you can play it without the sub subscription.

I enjoyed it alot! Though I just started, it was fantastic! I already decided to do it everyday beforeI play a game.
Thanks, Camm

reviews.review_description: This app is for anyone who has no time for the gym but still wants to keep up with good heart and strong muscles, hence awesome upper body

Thank you so much for your kind words and the 5-star rating!

We are thrilled to hear that our app is helping you maintain your health and strengthen your upper body, especially when you can't find the time for the gym. Our team has put a lot of heart into crafting this experience, so hearing that you find it beautifully made is incredibly rewarding for all of us.

We will certainly share your feedback with the entire team to keep us motivated as we continue to improve the app.

Keep up the great work with your workouts!

reviews.review_description: Love it fun and learn at the same time

developer_response.body:
Hello LaClasePR,

Thank you so much for your review!

Our team is thrilled to hear that you love the app and find it both fun and educational. Knowing that our users are having such a positive experience is our greatest motivation.

We will continue to work hard on development to bring you an even better experience. We hope you continue to enjoy learning and having fun with us!

reviews.review_description: I downloaded this app and loved it but it didn’t say prior to downloading that I had to purchase it. Gave a taste then took it away. I understand that apps have to be purchased and I would have purchased this if it was a flat rate up instead of a monthly / annual subscription. Thumbs down for that.

developer_response.body:
Hello JLynn526,

This was a bug on our end, and it has now been completely fixed!

We sincerely apologize for the lack of upfront information and for causing you disappointment. There was an issue where the subscription requirement was not properly displayed prior to downloading, and we are truly sorry that you were suddenly met with an unexpected paywall.

We will definitely share your feedback regarding a flat-rate purchase option with our team as an important reference for the future. Thank you so much for taking the time to share your valuable feedback with us.

reviews.review_title: LOVED it...until the jacked up the price
reviews.review_description: I used this app everyday for a while. I decided to sign up for access to more. This morning, I went up, and I cannot access anything. They want MORE money. I could not access content that I've been using for months. I'm very disappointed and am cancelling immediately. Don't waste your time.

developer_response.body:
Hello QueenB525,

What you have described—suddenly losing access to content you've been using—is certainly not the experience we intend for our users to have.

We are truly sorry for the significant inconvenience and frustration you have experienced with our app. We deeply apologize for this situation, especially as a dedicated daily user of our service.

Please be assured that we will share your report with our team to look into the situation and understand what occurred.

Regarding your request to cancel, you can manage your subscription through the Subscriptions section within your Meta account settings. Thank you for sharing your honest feedback with us.

reviews.review_description: A Small Price is not that bad, and I have enjoyed this app than Supernatural! Recommend this app to Gayle and James Giddings and Benjamin!

developer_response.body:
Hello alec.693727,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review!

We are honored to hear that you are enjoying your experience with our app and even want to recommend it to Gayle, James Giddings, and Benjamin.

Your support motivates our team to continue working hard to provide the best fitness experience possible.
We look forward to seeing you in the app!

reviews.review_description: Got this app cause it said $9.99 every three months! I was on it everyday and go on it today and said that I need to pay $60 and $8.99/month. That is crazy! They just stopped it, no for warnings, very pissed off about this! I enjoyed playing this a getting a work out but won’t be paying that much for it! Thanks for nothing!

developer_response.body:
Hello light633,

This was a system bug, and it has already been completely fixed in our latest update!

Please rest assured that the ""$60"" you saw was strictly a display error, and the actual subscription price has not changed from before.

We sincerely apologize for the sudden and incorrect display. We are truly sorry that this issue interrupted your daily workouts and caused you such frustration and disappointment.

We would be absolutely thrilled if you could feel safe to enjoy your daily workouts with us again. Thank you so much for taking the time to report this issue to us.
We'd love for you to try the updated version and see the improvement for yourself.

reviews.review_description:
It's much better than Les Mills Body Combat. No more repetitive actions and boring music. Here, it really looks like a real training for box alternating punch, hook, defenses... The music is also varied, and the actions are very dynamic, with a good succession of different actions, which makes me learn better to do hooks.
But I don't like the way to pay every month. I rather pay one shot, so I know how it costs, even I have to buy in-game items later and if I pay the whole price I'll be more motivated to continue 😁
So great job, I recommand, but please allow us other ways to pay even with commercials.

developer_response.body:
Hello SamFichier,

Thank you so much for your high rating and positive feedback! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying our boxing training, dynamic actions, and music variety. Knowing that our app is helping you improve your hooks is truly motivating for our team.

Thank you also for your feedback regarding the payment options. We will definitely share your request with the team.

We will continue to work hard on development to keep you motivated and excited about your workouts. Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_title: Hate the gym but this is perfect
reviews.review_description: I hate going to the gym, I don't have the time or patience. Tried out the free trial and loved doing it..I am an almost 50 year old woman. I bought the subscription and have been doing it every day for about 30 minutes. I do some short exercise to warm up then a 10-20 minute workout and then a couple short exercises to cool down. I of course over did it the first day and couldn't walk for 2 days! Lol but now I am into a groove and can see myself sticking with it. Do wish the music choices were regular everyday songs though or I would even buy a package with good songs on it! But overall an excellent app.

developer_response.body:
Hi FriendlyOrca4031, thank you so much for sharing your inspiring story with us! We are thrilled to have you as a subscriber.

It's wonderful to hear how you've integrated the app into your daily routine and found a rhythm that works for you, even after that very enthusiastic first day! We're glad the warm-up and cool-down exercises are helping you stay consistent and enjoy the experience.

Regarding your feedback on the music selection and the idea for song packs, thank you for the suggestion. We understand how much music influences the workout experience, and we will certainly share your request for ""regular everyday songs"" with our development team for future consideration.

We are committed to supporting your fitness journey and making it as enjoyable as possible. Keep up the amazing work!

reviews.review_description: I love this game but I want to purchase it so when I want to play I don't have to go through all the changes I have been through. Can you please set it to be purchased with upgrade when you add new beats or change some of the bugs. This sucks because I got hacked so I don't go into all the other parts of the games which include you going to where other players are I love my single players games please consider this changes

developer_response.body:
Hi blackdrvr, thank you so much for your support and for sharing your detailed feedback with us. 

We are thrilled to hear that you love the game! We truly appreciate your input regarding the one-time purchase option and your preference for single-player content. Your suggestions about the payment model and how we deliver updates are very helpful, and we will certainly share them with our development team for future consideration.

We are also glad that our game can provide a comfortable space for your fitness routine. Thank you for being part of our community, and we hope you continue to enjoy your workouts!

reviews.review_description: I have used this app for over a month and it's a fun workout with a good pace. However there are no updates to justify paying 10 dollars every month. The songs get boring after a while and I could see a one time purchase being worthy but to pay 100 dollars each year for an app that becomes stale after a month, makes little sense. There are more developed apps where you have much greater selection of music that you can get, and they don't require continued payments. With beat saber you pay extra for expansion packs and different music packs. Consider that model.

developer_response.body:
Hello Valerianka,

Thank you for using our app and for sharing your honest thoughts. We are glad to hear that you find the workouts fun and well-paced.

We deeply appreciate your suggestions regarding the subscription model, the frequency of updates, and the addition of music packs. We will definitely share your comments with our team as valuable feedback to help us improve the app experience.

We will continue to work hard on development. Thank you again for your time and review.

reviews.review_description: I LOVE boxing. I grew up watching it with my dad. I needed a workout routine that was fun and engaging. This is it! I love it and I feel so good after. I only wish we could upload our own music that would be EPIC!

developer_response.body:
Hi WolfyLemoon, thank you so much for the fantastic review!

We are so happy to hear that our app has become the fun and engaging workout routine you were looking for. It’s truly wonderful that boxing holds such a special place in your heart from growing up watching it with your dad!

Knowing that you feel so good after your sessions is the best reward for our team. Regarding your suggestion about uploading your own music, that sounds like an epic idea! We will definitely share this feedback with our development team as we look for ways to improve the experience for everyone.

We’ll keep working hard on development, and we hope you continue to enjoy your workouts!

reviews.review_description: The prices for the membership don’t make sense. I like the game but I need to know how much I am being charged. The quarterly plan says it is 9.99 a quarter but then says it is 2.25 a week. That would be 27 a quarter not 9.99. Then it says the monthly plan is 8.99 a month but also says 8.99 a week. Which is it?

developer_response.body:
Dear Cooljerkjr, 
we sincerely apologize that our current experience did not meet your expectations and for the confusion regarding the display. We are investigating this matter and will share your feedback with our team. You can check your exact plan details within your Meta account settings.

reviews.review_description: Burned over 8 thousand calories in 1 day I highly recommend.

Hi TheyHuntYou, thank you so much for the high rating!
 We are thrilled to hear that our app is helping you with your fitness journey. 
Our team is dedicated to continuing our development to provide you with the best possible experience. Keep up the great work!

reviews.review_title: why do i have to pay for everything
reviews.review_description: i am getting a free boxing game and then having two pay for it like what the hell kind of scam are you thinking of

Currently using my free trial which I am enjoying and have been using for the past 5 days, will definitely be  subscribing and using consistently to work out. I always use on hard mode to burn the most calories I can so I hope the calorie tracker is accurate. Only problem I have with the game is the music, I think it’s AI generated and overall just annoying 😭 I think it would be perfect if it was real music or if we could choose songs to work out to, it 
would make the experience so 
much more enjoyable for everyone. Other than that, love it.

developer_response.body:

We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the app and that you’ve decided to subscribe. It means a lot to us!

We also really appreciate your honest feedback about the music. We’ve shared your comments with our team as we work on making the experience even better for everyone.

Keep up the great work with your fitness journey!

developer_response.body:
HI Riepeat,

Thank you so much for the kind review! We are absolutely thrilled to hear that you are enjoying the workouts and the music so much.

Regarding your question about ""Follow My Lead"", this is actually an original track produced exclusively for our game. While we don't have a specific external artist or producer to point you to, we are incredibly honored that you love our original soundtrack that much!

We will continue to work hard on development to bring you the best fitness experience possible!

reviews.review_description: Not bad of a game however do wish that there was more detail to the perfect or missed hits ( like DDR or other rhythm games). Do think that they could possibly add more songs and make a genre list that suit people that pay the premium for it though.

developer_response.body:
Hello bountifulbear,

Thank you for your review and for sharing your feedback with us! We are glad to hear that you are enjoying the game.

Regarding your suggestions about adding more detail to the hit judgments (like Perfect or Miss) and the requests for more songs and a genre list for premium users, thank you for these valuable insights. 

We will make sure to share your feedback with our development team as we look for ways to improve the experience for our community.

We appreciate your support and will continue to work hard on the app's development. Thank you for being a part of our fitness community!

reviews.review_description: I'm on a boxing fitness game helping me lose weight 💪 like 👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind review, theflyfisherman2.2025!

We're thrilled to hear that you're loving the game. It’s wonderful to know that our boxing experience is supporting you on your fitness journey.

We’ll keep working hard to make the experience even better for you. Keep up the great work and thank you for playing!

reviews.review_title: More consecutive punches with same hand
reviews.review_description:
Just a quick suggestion to have less alternating hand punches (1 left followed by 1 right followed again by 1 left) and more consecutive punches with the same hand as in real life boxing.

Example, 3 jabs with one hand followed by 1 punch from the other hand, and vice versa.
Thanks!

developer_response.body:
Hi jake.735111,

Thank you for the 5-star rating and the specific suggestion!We appreciate your idea about incorporating more real-life boxing combinations, like consecutive punches with the same hand. I will make sure to share your feedback with the development team.Thank you for helping us improve the game!

reviews.review_title: An 'OK' game but not worth subscribing
reviews.review_description: This is an OK game. It's fun, nice music, and graphics are nice. But it's basically the same as 100 other games out there -- just hitting objects to music and dodging walls. Nothing different. I would buy it, just to have something to switch off to, if it was a one-time purchase of like $15 or something. But it's definitely not worth $40 a year as a subscription.

developer_response.body:
Hi nrgins,

Thank you for playing and for your compliments on the music and graphics.We genuinely understand that the subscription model is not for everyone. I will make sure to share your feedback regarding a one-time purchase option with the team.Thank you for your honesty.

reviews.review_description:
I am a 55yo woman who up until a month ago could barely walk without hobbling from my house to my car. I cut out all sugars 6 months prior to purchasing my Meta 3…lost 15 lbs …I was ready for exercise again (so I thought) I had a frustrating time with all the Meta’s health & fitness Apps (mainly due to my ADHD) and was about to give up. Most are too difficult to learn, not intuitive …… and tutorials that were too fast to try and keep up with.  I think I checked this one out last and was certain it would be just like the rest…THANK GOODNESS I WAS WRONG!!! 

This program has me addicted to using it! I work out 2-3 times a day. I started at the 3-min workout 3 weeks ago. I’m now doing two 10-minute workouts and a 4-min workout a day for the past week. 

It’s fun! It’s PERFECT for an ADHD’er. It’s an awesome program that this old and out-of-shape woman that hasn’t exercised in over 12 years can’t express her thanks to the developers enough! You’ve probably saved my life. !!!

developer_response.body:
Hi coogan2017,

Wow. Reading your review honestly brought tears to our eyes. Knowing that our app has helped you regain your mobility and confidence is exactly why we do what we do.

 We worked hard to make it intuitive and fun without being overwhelming, so your feedback validates that effort.

Congratulations on your weight loss and your amazing consistency (2-3 times a day is incredible!). Please keep it up, and thank you for sharing such a personal and inspiring story. You are the reason we keep developing!

reviews.review_description: i seriously dislike when a company isn't up front about a subscription because i won't even download the game, frankly there is nothing amazing about this game that would make me wanna subscription. there are so many games like this there are a one price game that i can't suggest this game. maybe if they move away from a subscription base where you can just outright by it and then by dlcs i would consider it but right now this is a big no

developer_response.body:
Hi Tiffer_online,

Thank you for sharing your honest thoughts.

We understand your frustration regarding subscriptions and your point about making this information clearer before download. I will make sure to share your feedback with the team.

Your comments will be used as valuable input as we continue to improve the experience.

Thank you again for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_title: Fun repetitive bad scoring, no song list
reviews.review_description: It has potential. The idea is fun and some tracks are mapped well but most are off tempo. Also even when you miss a hit it still acts like you hit it like the thing explodes and you hear the noise. Why is there no song list also? There are some songs i want to listen to outside of vr and i can't find them anywhere. Please publish a list or Playlist of the songs. I wish we could get more metal and rock songs. Most tracks are cheesy but its just for working out so that's not the worst thing ever.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, RedSunBlues. 
We sincerely apologize for the frustration caused by the tempo issues and the scoring feedback.

Regarding the hits and scoring mechanics, as well as your requests for a song list and more genres like Metal and Rock, we will share all of these points with our development team to be reviewed. We truly appreciate your input as it helps us understand how we can improve the experience. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Sorry
to expensive

developer_response.body:
Hi fischer.6767, 
thank you for the high rating. We are sorry to hear that our current experience did not fully meet your expectations. Please rest assured that your feedback is valuable to us, and we will share it with our team.

reviews.review_description: Trying to get the game for 2 weeks I finally got it and it was well worth it I love this game the calories that I burned in such a short limited time I love it if you try it you'll love iot also.

developer_response.body:
Hi 56c,

Thank you for the awesome review!

We are honored to hear that you felt it was well worth the wait to get the game.

It encourages our entire development team to hear that our app is helping with your fitness journey.

Thank you for recommending us to others! We will continue working hard to make the app even better. Please continue to enjoy your VR fitness!

reviews.review_description:
Edit: Tonight I was playing this game after it's most recent update, everything looked normal, just a few changes in UI during the gameplay. It looked ok, I was like 'yeah, ok ill do the 2 free passes and go to sleep', I guess the game had other plans as while playing I didn't touch any button, didn't go out boundaries, didn't damage my oculus, nothing at all. But every like few tons of hits, my game would turn black. After a second, it would be restored on a pause screen. Of course, I thought it was one time bug because I might ve pressed something while hitting the orbs. No, wasn't the case. Did 20 more hits, same thing happened. approx 20more, again. I was thinking of quitting right then despite having only 4min left because of these bugs but something told me to keep going. So I did. Though, it was unbearable as it became more frequent and after 5 hits or so it would appear each time. Thus resulting in my quit. I hope the devs fix this issue. 


Edit: Been absent for awhile on this game and when I came back the UI was stunning and the options to play for 10-30min straight was quite appealing to my eye. Though - as a free to play I only got 2 times to play in an entire day. Quite disappointed as before you could play unlimited times no matter if you bought the subscription or not.. Aswell as I gotta mention that most songs now cost money (like 90% of them that are longer than 3min. and are still made with AI), also.. the same songs get irritating to listen and box to everytime.. Could we get a change and maybe a free version where you can ACTUALLY PLAY like a decent being? I'm looking to lose weight here, not to empty my wallet just so I could do it. If I wanted to waste money while training my body, I could've easily bought a gym license for less. 



Edit: The game developer is actually checking the reviews and fixing everything as requested. Might just say the game is slowly but surely turning awesome? 

First time I've played this in order to exercise — the headset detection is off by maybe 30 cm from your original headset so whenever you have to crouch you have to do a Japanese bow or touch the ground in order to make it count. Then, the calories are counted incorrectly hence when you miss more than 20 you apparently do better than having a higher score and having 0-6misses. The songs also sound AI or randomly made, the lyrics make no sense half of the time. Aswell as you don't have to put in the power or anything to hit the approaching orbs, they're detected by a simple touch so you can just stand still and it'll register the hits. (I've tested everything just the previous day before writing this review). Then, I can also say that there's just not enough songs to play to actually lose weight or anything. The only song I've seen that has over 50calories to lose is 'Unstoppable' and it's basically impossible to get lower than S tier when finishing the game. Fix the issues mentioned above and the game might aswell go swell.

developer_response.body:
Hi jj.aic,

We are sorry for the inconvenience.

Thank you so much for always taking the time to write such detailed reviews. Feedback like yours is invaluable to us.

Regarding the black screen issue you reported, we are currently investigating if similar issues are occurring.

We will continue to do our best to improve the game so that you can fully enjoy it.

reviews.review_title: Great i wish we can choose the music
reviews.review_description: I love it good training

developer_response.body:
Hello 7assann7000,

Thank you for your great review! We are so glad to hear that you love the app and find it to be a good training experience.

Regarding your request to choose your own music, we will definitely share this with our team as valuable feedback for future improvements.

We will continue to work hard on development. Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description:
What can I say except once I tried it, I WAS HOOKED!!  If you want to work up a sweat while working out and not needing the gym, then this is for you.  

It has various workouts with time limits and it measures how much calories you have burned.  It is addicting and I also got my kids playing this and making them workout as well.  

Not taking away from people who goes to the gym because I do as well, but it is good if you need a quick calorie burn while working on cardio.

developer_response.body:
Hi haynwhodatnation,
Wow, thank you for the amazing energy!

This is the kind of review we dream of!

Thank you so much! Hearing that you are "addicted" and that your kids are playing too motivates us incredibly. It is an honor to be part of your fitness life!

We will give our best to keep improving the game for you and your family!

reviews.review_description: I like this game but it is like beatsaber but with your fists and no offense developers but i wouldn't by the subscription but overall good game keep up the good work devs

developer_response.body:
Hi CTninja48, thank you for the feedback and for your kind words of encouragement! We're so glad to hear you're enjoying the game.

We also truly appreciate your honest input regarding the subscription model; understanding our players' perspectives is very important to us, and we will certainly share your comments with our development team as a valuable reference.

Thank you for your support, and we’ll keep working hard to improve the experience. We hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description:
I do like you can get started with a number track and short workouts for free, and the developers have kept adding features since I started with this a few months ago. I had stopped using it for a while but when I came back to it, they had added blocks, and planned 5, 10, 20 minute sessions which seem to vary the pace and provide good variety. 
I do which there was at least a help section for beginners, to help build some skill at the punches, what each of the balls are specifically looking for or a training mode for each type of target so you know what action is optimum, like targets with a glowing shield, am I supposed to hit them harder or softer? The block symbol, to I hit that jar or just hod gloves up to static block etc.  but I’m enjoying it so far, trying for at least 3 20 minute sessions a week.

developer_response.body:
Hi TheChromeRonin,

Thank you for the detailed review!

We are happy to hear you like the new features, such as the blocks and session duration variations. Welcome back!

Your suggestions regarding a beginner help section or a training mode to explain specific targets (like the glowing shield or block mechanics) are very valuable feedback for improving the player experience and helping users understand the game mechanics.

I will make sure to share your feedback with the team.

We are rooting for your goal of 3 times a week! Keep enjoying your workout!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed it, quite fun. Not too hard. But definitely not worth a monthly subscription for me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, norap543!

We're glad to hear you found the game fun and enjoyable.
We truly appreciate your honest opinion and will share your feedback with our team as we continue to work on improving the experience for everyone. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description: J want the app to get out there. But it is a Fit XR copy in a lot of ways. Main dowfall is the random rapid fire punching, no person natural will jab, upercut, AND hook punch all at the same time. Great workout if you want to randomly flail your arms around to work up a sweat. That said there are a few reasons i would say its better then Fit Xr. 1 it ACTUALLY has pasthrough mode and its really the best I've ever seen in an exercise game so far. 2 the membership is so cheap at just about 3 bucks a month, however that can change as well like Fit XR who was free for years then started charging $29 a month for again random flailing arms. If this game stays true to the price AND works on making workouts like Les Mills Bodycombat where you actually throw a hook to the beat like....NOW... Nice hit, then this game fit beat combat could become one of the best and most used for years to come

developer_response.body: Hi epiCJesus777, thank you for your detailed review! We're happy to hear you're enjoying the passthrough mode and our cheap membership price! Your detailed feedback is very helpful, and we'll use it for future improvements. Keep enjoying your workout!

reviews.review_description: As an ex competitor in MMA who has gained weight this app has gotten me excited about training again bravo!!!

developer_response.body: Hi FieryClownfish4480, thank you for the "Must have" review! We are thrilled to hear that, as an ex-competitor, our app has gotten you excited about training again. That's a huge bravo to you!  Keep enjoying the training!

reviews.review_description: I loved this one because I gave me such a good workout. But recently, the leaderboard isn’t working and it’s only keeping track of my personal calories and that is so unmotivating. Like I’m ready to switch to a different app that’s similar. I’m really disappointed because I’ve actually paid for this one so that’s too bad but without them making these fixes, I don’t see myself sticking around.
i'm gonna see this is one of the best workout vr games i played and i give that a five star

developer_response.body: Hi Onaga.1994, thank you for calling us "The best"! We're so happy to hear you feel this is one of the best workout VR games you've played and gave us five stars! We're thrilled to hear you feel that way. Keep enjoying your workout!

reviews.review_description:
This app is great if all you want to do is box. I’m not entirely sure why they have so many “different” programs because it seems that they only change the music and length of workouts. 
I was hoping there might be some stretching/yoga type cool down stuff in here but it’s just all boxing with different music. 
For $3/month though it’s great value.

developer_response.body: Hi Kiwidogs, thank you for your review! We're happy to hear you find it a "Great boxing only app" and that the value is great for the price! Your feedback is very helpful, and we'll use it for future improvements. Keep enjoying your workout!

reviews.review_description: not enough feedback when you hit the targets compared to some other fitness apps, and the uppercut targets could do to be moved closer to the centre, there to wide for my taste.

developer_response.body:
Hi BaldingRage,

Thank you for your honest feedback.We appreciate your specific points regarding the hit feedback and the placement of the uppercut targets. I will make sure to share your suggestions with the team for future consideration.Thank you for helping us make the experience better.

reviews.review_description: supernatural is so much better and this isn't a paid ad lol this app sucked.

I like to do 2 or 3 sessions a day. Burns calories, and gets your heart pumping, all while having fun. A good collection of music as well as having 3 levels per song to fit your workout needs. If any glitches show up in the updates, they are supper fast to correct it. I love the favorite ❤ let's me find my workouts fast. My only request would be to have more high calorie burning songs.
Fun and fun

developer_response.body:
Hi Eskape_00,

Thank you for the enthusiastic review! We are thrilled to hear you are enjoying the game.

We will continue working hard on development to make it even more enjoyable!

reviews.review_description:
Love this app. One of the best boxing games. Had issues with other apps where my punches wouldn't register. No such issues here. It also has pretty satisfying punch graphics and many free songs.
It's fairly priced if you want more functionality.
Paid for one of the top apps in the store before and it wasn't as good as this one. I also like that it doesn't have a 30 minute intro to the game and it takes a very short time to load.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you for the incredible review! We're so happy you feel it's one of the best. We worked hard on the punch recognition and fast loading, so it means a lot that you noticed. Thanks for motivating us!

reviews.review_description: I use Power Beats and Les Mills Bodycombat when I want to get a bit of a workout. Not into subscriptions because there are so many others to choose from without the monthly bill ( don't we have enough of those) . But l like to add variety also and at $10 for a year....you can't beat that price. And playing the hard levels will burn some calories. Colorful levels as well. The music is not to my taste for the most part but I just mute and Put on some Spotify and let the punches fly. I just wish they had a total timer to better gauge my workout. Grab the free version and give it a try...you got nothing to lose...except maybe a few pounds.

Edit: The game developer is actually checking the reviews and fixing everything as requested. Might just say the game is slowly but surely turning awesome? 🤩🥳🎉

First time I've played this in order to exercise - 🏋️‍♀️🤸‍♀️🧘

the headset detection is off by maybe 30 cm from your original headset so whenever you have to crouch you have to do a Japanese bow or touch the ground in order to make it count. 🙇‍♀️🤔🤦‍♀️ Then, the calories are counted incorrectly hence when you miss more than 20 you apparently do better than having a higher score and having O-6misses. 🙄📉🤨 The songs also sound Al or randomly made, the lyrics make no sense half of the time. 🎶🎤🤪 Aswell as you don't have to put in the power or anything to hit the approaching orbs, they're detected by a simple touch so you can just stand still and it'll register the hits. 🕹️🕹️🤨 (I've tested everything just the previous day before writing this review). Then, I can also say that there's just not enough songs to play to actually lose weight or anything. 🏋️‍♀️🎶😕 The only song I've seen that has over 50calories to lose is 'Unstoppable' and it's basically impossible to get lower than S tier when finishing the game. 💪🔥💯 Fix the issues mentioned above and the game might 1 aswell go swell. 👍🤞🌟
I'm having so much fun!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi EleventySix,

Thank you for the amazing review! Hearing that you enjoy the game makes all our hard work worth it.

We will continue to do our best!

reviews.review_description: Absolutely amazing game. So mutch exersise and so mutch fun. I lose so many calories. Install it and you will love it!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi efcgamer14,

Thank you for such a passionate review! We are so happy to hear that you are loving the calorie burn and having fun.

We will continue working hard on development to make the game even better for you!

reviews.review_description: It won't let me unsubscribe

developer_response.body:
Hi lettj,

Thank you very much for the 4-star review and for playing our game.

We’re sorry to hear that you're having trouble unsubscribing.

Subscriptions are managed through the Meta account system, so the cancellation process can be completed from your Meta account settings.

We apologize for the inconvenience, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game.

reviews.review_title: The app has great potential, but...
reviews.review_description: The app has great potential, but very poor implementation. In fact, it is a very simple app in terms of development, but even so it is not without bugs. And at the same time they want money for a subscription, and not a small amount. I would like to see more settings, now in the app you can't configure anything at all, except for the user’s height. The backgrounds are of very low resolution. The virtual girl irritates me with her unnatural movements. The appearance of the balls does not always correspond to the rhythm of the music. I would like to have the ability for users to add their own tracks with their training programs, expanding the built-in library. I would like to have more different movements, etc.

reviews.review_title: Fun and it works for a little bit
reviews.review_description: I love the game but I just wish that the songs/workouts were longer than 5 minutes. Also the music sounds a little bit like ai, nothing wrong with that but it does get a little bit an annoying. It would be great if we could chose our songs and then have ai make the beats. Besides all that I love the game and find it a fun way to workout after a long day. Its fun at first but with out a subscription after long enough it becomes unplayable.

developer_response.body:
Hi EverestFox2013, thank you so much for your review and for sharing your feedback with us! We are glad to hear that you find the game a fun way to work out after a long day.

We truly appreciate your detailed input regarding the workout lengths and the music style. Your suggestions, including the idea to choose your own songs, are very insightful, and we will certainly share them with our development team as we look for ways to improve the experience and understanding of the mechanics.

Regarding the content available without a subscription, we understand your perspective and thank you for trying out our initial offerings. We are committed to continuing our development to provide a better experience for everyone. We hope you keep enjoying the workouts!

reviews.review_description:
Why are they trying to force a subscription by limiting the free plays? The subscription is too high. How many free plays do you get? I may need to find another boxing exercise video.

KV
I like the game but it's expensive

Poor graphics: low res, basic object shapes, diy visuals
Basic gameplay: Beatsaber on minimums
Lame mechanics: you miss your punches even when you don’t
And free version is limited by number of rounds per day

What free Beatsaber? Go with Moon Rider

Love, it. I'm not experiencing "missed punches" as per some of the reviews, and this has definitely got me moving....and, dare I say, sweating!  Good price for a years subscription. I'd recommend signing up for the free trial, nothing to lose.....except, a lb or two!

Every single fitness game is either “pay for free trial” or it just genuinely costs money. This is the only one I’ve seen that doesn’t require any of those, partially. I still enjoy the fact it gives you a hand full of workouts to do for free.
Imputs dont matter. You can just line up your hands to the targets and would still register as a correct hit.

reviews.review_title: It still needs a lot of work...
reviews.review_description:
Although i didn't like this game at all when i first tried it a while ago i noticed that they are constantly updating it with fixes and new changes which should normally sound very impressive for a completely free boxing fitness app.
So i decided today to give it another try and it finally makes sense why they care so much about it as it is asking for a monthly based subscription in order to unlock all the songs/workouts.
I am already paying subscriptions and buying DLCs for other fitness apps so this is no problem for me. However this doesn't look like it's ready for public use yet as it looks very basic and in early stages.
I can't believe that after so long there is still no way to pause a workout or exit to the main menu anytime you wish. Your only option is to either completely close the app or finish the workout.
Moreover there are performance issues and it feels very laggy even though the visuals look quite poor and cheap.
Perhaps in the future after many more fixes and changes it might get a chance.
The songs just scream 45yr old facebook mums

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback,Mr_jai440.

We appreciate your honest opinion regarding the music selection.

We understand that musical taste is personal, and we're sorry to hear the current tracklist didn't match your preference.

We will share your feedback with our team as we continue to work on future content updates.

reviews.review_description:
Love this app BUT it appears every time there is an update it introduces more issues.
This time the 'stuttering' is less BUT, it now doesn't count the hits, calculate the calories properly. Sometimes registers the 'hit' feedback on the wrong controller (very disconcerting).
I still love it though....

reviews.review_title: Playing the free game and it is fun
reviews.review_description: For a guy that got the quest to try and loose some weight i think this might help
Really good game to warm you up in the morning

developer_response.body:
Hi farmerjeffAC1,

Thank you for the 5 stars! We are so happy to be part of your daily workout routine.

Keep moving and stay healthy!

We will continue working hard on development to make the game even better for you!

reviews.review_description: I've played this for a few hours and there are lots of positive things to say about this app....love the fact its free, great music, good variety of exercise moves, great visuals, etc, etc.  However, and here comes the BUT, the hit register just isn't accurate enough for it to be a serious exercise app.  I've lost count of the number of times I've 'missed' a punch and I find that extremely frustrating.  I'd say the hit accuracy sits at around 85% which is a bit poor for an app specifically designed for hitting things.  If this issue could be fixed it'd be perfect!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We've made punches easier to land now.

reviews.review_description: Can u please refund my 9.99anf cancel subscription I really need it
